Thanks everyone, welcome to 123 Fitness' Virtual Cookbook. The reason that we made this was to help you succeed, honestly. So we figured what other obstacles can we take out of the way to make the likelihood of success higher for you in this challenge. And so I think it's one thing, and we started for a long time ago just using the meal plans, and then after that we developed the recipe book, and now we have the virtual cookbook. And so what this portal will do is actually shows you how to make each one of the recipes in 30 seconds or less. And so they're meant to be consumable so that this whole huge change in lifestyle isn't intimidating because I can tell you that normal people are the ones who do it, and so all you have to do is just confront it and get in, and get your hands dirty for lack of a, I guess pun intended. But yeah, we're going to continue to update this, we'll continue to add more things to this, so this is just one of the benefits that you have being a member with us here, and you will continue to have access to this stuff, and all the updates, and all the power foods, and all the other things that we'll continue to throw in here, because this is really just the beginning of some really cool stuff that we're doing in the background to help serve you at a higher level. One small thing that I just want to mention is that what we have found after doing this a lot of times is that there are only 7 to 10 foods that most people eat on a regular basis. So most people cycle through usually only one or two breakfasts, one or two lunches, and then dinner there tends to be a little bit more variety. And so my request for you is that in the next six weeks all I want you to do is just figure out a couple breakfasts that you actually like and that you could eat for a long period of time, a couple lunches that you could eat for a long period of time, and then a few dinner options, because all we're going to try and do is just get you to switch from the few dinner options and the few lunch and the few breakfast options that you already picked now to a few breakfast lunches and dinner options from this list. And that's how we can make lifelong changes. It's not by having some crazy skills or some complicated anything. It's like all we have to do is just switch the stuff that you were eating to the stuff that we're going to eat now, and some of that just takes experimentation. You might have a breakfast that you don't like, but that's okay. You're going to find another one and then eat another one after that. And then eventually you will find one, I promise, because if this is encouraging to you, there are no fit people who are more disciplined than you. They've just found things that they like, and so they continue to eat those things, but they are not more disciplined than you. I am not more disciplined than you are. I've just found things that I like, and those things are included in here. And so I'd encourage you to just take the time for the next six weeks to actually find 10 foods that you like, and then you can literally solve this thing for good. So anyways, enjoy. Don't be intimidated by it. Try it one at a time. Have fun with it. And the best is yet to come, I promise. All right? So enjoy, eat up, not too much, but I'll see you on the other side.
